response.overview: Nik has just completed a murder case involving a man named Daud. Daud is accused of intentional murder. If Daud is found guilty, he will receive the death penalty. Daud's murder of his own friend, Azali, receives condemnation from society. One day, Nik is forced to leave home for several weeks due to work matters. Suraya and their child, Aimi, live their lives as usual until Suraya meets Tasha at a supermarket. Nik begins to feel uneasy thinking about his family's safety. Aimi tells him that she dislikes Tasha because Tasha is rather strange. At the same time, Daud remains silent and refuses to assist the police investigation. For him, if the police want the real answer, Daud can ask the police to bring his girlfriend as a witness. The police begin to search for information about Daud's girlfriend. Who is the real murderer of Azali?
response.title: Dosa Perempuan
